final:
module barrel_shifter (
    input [7:0] input_data,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            2'b00: data_out = input_data; // No shift
            2'b01: data_out = input_data << 1; // Shift left
            2'b10: data_out = input_data >> 1; // Shift right
            2'b11: data_out = {input_data[6:0], input_data[7]}; // Rotate left
            default: data_out = 8'b00000000; // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
